title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at HDFC Life Insurance - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at HDFC Life Insurance - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with HDFC Life Insurance! We are hiring a Risk Analyst for our Delhi team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About HDFC Life Insurance:
HDFC Life Insurance is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HDFC Life Insurance!
